issue.title: Flatten dashboard queue contract around Flow state
issue.summary: Demo active work item for Flow dashboard.

metadata.documentationSummary: Documented that flow-dashboard is a read-only human mirror and dashboard reloads only re-read /api/dashboard.

workerRuns.summary: Hardened the dashboard into a read-only mirror: removed dashboard action/event surfaces, removed command event UI, fixed provider-neutral issue status and URL mirroring, and tightened dashboard smoke coverage.

Extended the read-only dashboard hardening: removed unused event stream helper, added a dashboard readonly contract check to check/test, updated docs to state the mirror-only contract, and verified the running dashboard.
Hardened the dashboard as a minimal read-only Flow mirror with a navy theme, flow-like mark, provider-neutral issue metadata, snapshot reload wording, and static/smoke guards against action routes.

Hardened the dashboard mirror contract by allowing only inspectDashboardQueue runtime calls, then stabilized the demo queue by replacing @me with the explicit camden-lowrance assignee in .flow/config.yaml.
Removed the dashboard appearance/settings menu and browser-local theme storage so the UI stays focused on Flow state, while keeping theme application config-driven.
Changed the dashboard display label for raw workflowState selected to In Flow and renamed Flow State to Flow Stage, keeping the underlying API mirror unchanged.
Renamed dashboard detail link labels from Open Issue/Open PR to Issue/PR and added static guards against command-shaped detail link labels.
Dashboard wording now keeps selected as an internal Flow ledger state and presents it as In Flow in the read-only mirror.
Dashboard view selection wording now uses active/snapshot terms instead of selected, keeping selected as a raw Flow ledger state only.
Dashboard view selection wording now uses active/snapshot terms instead of selected, keeping selected as a raw Flow ledger state only.
Dashboard Flow CLI bridge is private to the read-only state module and guarded by the dashboard readonly contract check.
Dashboard no longer exposes a manual Reload control; the UI only auto-polls the read-only /api/dashboard snapshot endpoint.
Dashboard presentation is now built in only: no UI config payload, custom CSS/assets route, theme module, or dashboard theme config validation remains.
Dashboard snapshot payload no longer exposes host health details; /healthz is minimal and separate from the mirror payload.
Dashboard mirror contract no longer exposes Autoflow orchestration fields in runtime queue, API payload, or UI types.
Dashboard is now a read-only Flow mirror with raw selected state translated to demo-safe stage wording, no dashboard actions, no UI config surface, and a minimal snapshot API.
Dashboard now translates internal selected workflow state into demo-safe stage wording, keeps the client status model minimal, and exposes only read-only snapshot data.
Trimmed dashboard mirror payloads to omit absent fields and local worktree paths while keeping the UI read-only and demo-safe.
Hardened dashboard state labels so unknown workflow states render as Other instead of derived raw internal labels.
Hardened dashboard search so it uses visible stage labels and does not index raw workflow states or hidden URLs.
Mapped PR review decision values to friendly dashboard labels while preserving the read-only mirror contract.
Mapped visible blocker text to friendly labels and kept search aligned with visible blocker wording while preserving the read-only mirror payload.
Changed issue and PR references from button-like controls to read-only metadata links while preserving the dashboard mirror data.
Removed raw commit head SHA exposure from the dashboard mirror API, UI, and search path.
Changed evidence and documentation booleans to read-only status labels in the dashboard detail panel.
Changed dashboard stage filters to count and filter by visible labels instead of raw workflowState values.
Reworded dashboard loading and topbar copy to snapshot/read-only mirror language instead of implementation-specific runtime wording.
Reworded issue card fallback status to neutral mirror copy and kept dashboard UI free of adapter-specific wording.
Moved PR check state wording into a dashboard display helper and removed old checks passing/failing fragments.
Clarified dashboard work status wording: selected now displays as Active, Flow Stage/State wording is removed, and static checks guard the labels.
Made the dashboard queue projection session-aware so the visible Active item mirrors the current Flow session. Added coverage for stale selected ledger state being demoted in the dashboard view.
Removed local workspace path and raw commit head fields from the dashboard queue contract and added guard/test coverage so the read-only dashboard mirror cannot regress to exposing them.
Trimmed dashboard health to liveness only and removed unused refresh daemon/status helpers, with readonly guard coverage for the simplified health surface.
Made the dashboard default focus follow the mirrored active Flow issue instead of the first queue item, while preserving user-clicked focus during polling.
Removed duplicate visible Work Status text from the detail panel and guarded against reintroducing the duplicate status label pattern.
Labeled blockers in the public dashboard payload and added smoke/static coverage so raw readiness blocker wording does not leak through /api/dashboard.
Changed the browser-facing dashboard contract from raw workflowState keys to display workStatus labels and updated UI/static/smoke guards around that contract.
Changed the browser-facing dashboard evidence/docs contract from raw booleans to display record status labels and updated UI/static/smoke coverage.
Changed the browser-facing dashboard PR/review contract from raw provider fields to display labels and updated UI/static/smoke coverage.
Removed external issue/PR URLs from the browser-facing dashboard and replaced them with plain link-presence labels, with static, smoke, API, and browser verification.
Replaced browser-facing repoKeys with repository labels and removed branch details from the dashboard API/UI, with static, smoke, API, and browser verification.
Replaced browser-facing per-issue updatedAt timestamps with display updatedLabel values, with static, smoke, API, and browser verification.
Removed non-actionable issue/PR link presence from the browser-facing dashboard API and UI, with static, smoke, API, and browser verification.
Replaced browser-facing snapshot.refreshedAt/ageSeconds with snapshot.freshnessLabel, with static, smoke, API, and browser verification.
Replaced browser-facing issueStatus with statusLabel, with static, smoke, API, and browser verification.

Hardened dashboard route-level read-only behavior by blocking request-input use in static checks and expanding smoke/live verification for query input plus POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE on /api/dashboard.
Replaced browser-facing blockers with blockerLabels and made the UI consume labels directly, with static, smoke, API, and browser verification.
Added strict dashboard payload allowlist coverage to smoke tests and verified the live API/browser still expose only the mirror state contract.
Replaced dashboard runtime workflowState output with display workStatus labels and extended smoke/static checks so selected cannot leak through the dashboard queue contract.

Hardened the dashboard runtime queue into a display-only mirror contract and extended smoke/static checks to reject raw URLs, branch details, repo keys, blockers, PR provider fields, record booleans, and workflowState.
Added an explicit dashboard API issue allowlist and static guard so /api/dashboard cannot return non-public issue fields even if the runtime queue changes.
Added a client-side dashboard issue normalizer and static guard so fetched issue payloads are reduced to display-only mirror fields before React state, search, or rendering.
Extended dashboard smoke coverage to inspect served JS/CSS assets for forbidden command routes, raw dashboard fields, raw workflow states, and command labels.
Added no-store cache headers for dashboard mirror responses and smoke/static coverage to keep the UI shell and mirror JSON from being cached as stale state.
Added readonly guardrails that reject browser persistence, navigation, forms, clipboard, workers, and secondary transports from the dashboard UI source and served dashboard assets.
Added client-side allowlists for dashboard work and record status labels so raw workflow and ledger tokens cannot render through display fields.
Removed dashboard API and client error-detail propagation so failure paths stay generic while the dashboard remains a display-only mirror.
Made the dashboard health endpoint non-cacheable and added smoke coverage that it exposes only ok:true.
Made dashboard JS/CSS asset responses non-cacheable and added smoke/static checks for stale bundle prevention.
Strengthened dashboard smoke coverage so selected internal state must render as Active and raw workflow state values stay out of mirror payloads.
Added mirror-only response headers, tightened smoke/static verification for those headers, and fixed flow-dashboard stale-dist rebuild detection.
Added mirror-only response headers, tightened smoke/static verification for those headers, and fixed flow-dashboard stale-dist rebuild detection.
Extended dashboard mirror policy with Permissions-Policy and explicit 404 responses, and made smoke verify unavailable routes keep mirror headers.
Added dashboard smoke fingerprints proving blocked command and mutation requests leave API and runtime mirror state unchanged.
Added served HTML shell checks so command controls and raw workflow state cannot bypass the JS/CSS dashboard asset scan.
Moved dashboard display-label normalization into a shared module and applied it at both the API and browser boundaries so raw workflow labels cannot leak as dashboard state.
Marked every dashboard button/input as an explicit local mirror control and added checks that reject unmarked or non-allowlisted UI controls in source and served assets.
Extended the dashboard smoke and readonly contract so query parameters cannot shape mirrored issue state and unavailable routes must return only ok:false.
Added an explicit dashboard server method guard so only GET/HEAD reach mirror routes; OPTIONS and mutation methods return ok:false with mirror headers, and the smoke now verifies OPTIONS too.
Hardened dashboard shell serving: root now serves the same mirror shell as /dashboard, shell query input is ignored, and missing assets/favicons return ok:false.
Hardened dashboard mirror response isolation headers and smoke coverage for CSP, cross-origin isolation, DNS prefetch, and frame denial across success and fallback routes.
Removed remaining mutable theme hooks from the dashboard presentation and enforced the fixed navy mirror in readonly and smoke checks.

testsRun: live non-read method checks across /api/dashboard, /dashboard, /healthz, and /api/actions/select
